overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a rainy neon-lit night market street and entering a narrow food stall to interact with a vendor before exiting back to the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy cyberpunk night market street with neon signage

events.description: begins walking forward from the covered stall area into the open street
pedestrian in wide-brimmed hat passes close by on the left side

agents.ego_description: walking through the rainy night market street toward a food stall entrance

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in hat and coat walking along the wet street

entered.detail: metal counter with items on top at the starting position
green neon sign with OPEN text glowing brightly
tall futuristic buildings with holographic advertisements
covered market stalls lining the left side of the street

segments.scene_description: The scene opens from behind a food counter looking out onto a rainy cyberpunk night market. The camera walks forward through the wet streets, passing a pedestrian in a hat on the left, with neon signs and vendor stalls visible along the path toward a narrow food stall entrance ahead.

events.description: entering the enclosed food stall from the open street
shifting from cool neon street lighting to warmer interior artificial light

agents.ego_description: walking into the narrow corridor of the food stall

entered.detail: translucent plastic strips hanging in the doorway
dark metal walls enclosing the narrow passage
perforated metal wall section with geometric patterns

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a narrow corridor leading into a food stall, passing blue support pillars and plastic strip curtains. The environment shifts from the open rainy street to a sheltered, artificially lit narrow passage with metal walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: cramped food preparation area with cooking equipment

events.description: approaching the food counter and moving around to examine the cooking area
turning around to begin exiting the food stall

agents.ego_description: approaching the food vendor and examining the cooking area inside the cramped stall

notable_agents.action: food vendor with pink hair cooking at the grill station

entered.detail: long metal counter with food preparation surfaces
active cooking grill with steam rising
plastic bags of meat hanging from the ceiling
circular yellow and blue sign with Emperor's text and logo
illuminated digital display showing menu items

segments.scene_description: Deep inside the narrow food stall, the camera approaches the preparation counter where a vendor with pink hair works at a steaming grill. The cramped space features hanging meat bags, an Emperor's sign, and digital menu screens before the camera turns to exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: returning to the night market street

events.description: exiting the food stall back to the open street
returning to the cooler neon-lit exterior environment

agents.ego_description: leaving the food stall and returning to the rainy market street

entered.detail: green neon OPEN sign visible again at the exit
rainy street with reflective wet pavement visible ahead
futuristic city buildings with glowing advertisements

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the narrow food stall, passing back through the plastic curtains and blue pillars to return to the rainy neon-lit street. The green OPEN sign is visible again as the scene opens back up to the bustling night market environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rainy, neon-lit night market into the cramped interior of a food stall before returning to the open street. It begins by walking forward through wet streets past a pedestrian in a hat, moving toward a narrow entrance flanked by glowing vendor stalls. As the camera enters the stall, the environment shifts from the open rain to a sheltered, artificially lit corridor defined by blue support pillars and plastic strip curtains. The scene then tightens into a cramped preparation area featuring a pink-haired vendor at a steaming grill, hanging meat bags, and digital menus, before the camera turns to backtrack. Finally, the view passes once more through the plastic curtains and blue pillars, opening back up to the bustling night market and the glow of a green open sign.
